title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DEVELOPMEN DISABILITIES SERVICES COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support services for intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services can include case management, individual and family support plans, access to brokerage services for transportation, in-home supports or residential placement, and employment and vocational services. 182 SW Academy Street Suite 350 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Children and adults with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and U.S. citizen. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 831-5969 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 831-5969 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application for Developmental Disabilities services. An appointment will be scheduled with an eligibility worker who can help with the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, and records of any/all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability AREA SERVED: Polk County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DEVELOPMEN DISABILITIES SERVICES
